title: Nigerian youths remain the nation’s greatest asset for development-Dangote - FinancialEDGE
description: Foremost industrialist and President of Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote has described Nigerian youths as the nation’s greatest asset emphasizing their creativity, resilience and ingenuity Dangote made these remarks at the weekend while being conferred with an honorary doctorate degree in Management Technology (D.MT) by the Federal University of Technology, Owerri (FUTO). He said Nigerian
html: Foremost industrialist and President of Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote has described Nigerian youths as the nation’s greatest asset emphasizing their creativity, resilience and ingenuity
